ddls:
CREATE TABLE "attacks" (
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack */,
  "attack_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each attack */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the attack */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the attack */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the attack */,
  "attack_time" TEXT /* Exact time of the attack */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the attack occurred */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the attack occurred */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the attack occurred */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the attack occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the attack location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the attack location */,
  "attack_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of attack */,
  "killed" INTEGER /* Number of people killed in the attack */,
  "wounded" INTEGER /* Number of people wounded in the attack */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target of the attack */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the attack */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the terrorist group responsible for the attack */,
  "target_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of target */,
  "weapon_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of weapon used */,
  "attack_status" TEXT /* Status of the attack */,
  "attack_motive" TEXT /* Motive behind the attack */,
  "attack_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the attack */,
  "attack_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the attack */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the information about the attack */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the attack has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attack record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attack record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attacks_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attacks_weapon_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_type_id") REFERENCES weapon_types ("weapon_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attacks_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attacks_attack_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("attack_type_id") REFERENCES attack_types ("attack_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attacks_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attacks_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attacks_target_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_type_id") REFERENCES target_types ("target_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attacks_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the country record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or province */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attack_types" (
  "attack_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack type */,
  "attack_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the attack type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attack type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attack type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attack type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the terrorist group */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date when the group was founded */,
  "dissolved" TEXT /* Date when the group was dissolved */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the leader of the group */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_types" (
  "target_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target type */,
  "target_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the target type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the target type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the target type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_types" (
  "weapon_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon type */,
  "weapon_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weapon type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weapon type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the weapon type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
